name: Di Saronno Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs and butter; press over the bottom and sides of a greased 9-inch spring-form pan.
2. Chill the mixture.
3. Preheat the oven to 325°F (173°C).
4. Beat together the ricotta and cream cheese until smooth.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (sugar, Di Saronno Amaretto, and salt) to the ricotta-cream cheese mixture; beat until smooth.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until firm in the middle.
8. Cool for 20-30 minutes in the pan before removing it from the spring form.
9. Allow the cheesecake to cool completely before serving.
